note: This case is from SQLancer bugs.json. The executable SQL strips report comments; the oracle is the stable signature observed on the current sqlite3 binary.

observed_runs.stderr: Runtime error near line 5: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed (19)
Runtime error near line 5: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed (19)

original_test: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0, c1 a UNIQUE AS (1), c2, c3, FOREIGN KEY(c3) REFERENCES t0(c1));
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts4(c0);
REPLACE INTO t0(c3, c2, c0) VALUES (0, 0, 0), (0, 0, 0); -- Segmentation fault
title: REPLACE causes segfault in table with generated column and foreign key
